name: trycue
description: AI 内容试映工作台：在真正发布前，把内容交给一组 AI 观众试映。
author: donghao95

scripts.test:integration: cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./data/trycue_test.db pnpm --filter @trycue/db db:deploy && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./data/trycue_test.db pnpm --filter @trycue/api test:integration
scripts.test:integration:smoke: cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./data/trycue_test.db pnpm --filter @trycue/db db:deploy && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./data/trycue_test.db pnpm --filter @trycue/api test:integration:smoke
scripts.verify: pnpm db:generate && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:integration && pnpm build
